title: Mossel Bay teen missing
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Police have asked the...
bodyText:
MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Police have asked the public to be on the lookout for 16-year-old Nicole Luterek.


> She was last seen at about 10:00 this morning, 26 November, in Marsh Street. She has dark hair, tied up in a bun. She is wearing a white shirt, a black mini skirt, and white takkies.


She is also believed to have a blue carry bag with her. If anyone sees her or knows of her whereabouts, please contact the Mossel Bay Police Station ( 044 606 2800), Louise Luterek (082 784 8193), Captain Jackie Grundlingh (82 778 7304) or the Mossel Bay Joint Operation Centre (044 606 5056) immediately.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
